basic_details.organization_name: Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malaviya Cancer Centre (MPMMCC)
basic_details.short_information: Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malaviya Cancer Centre (MPMMCC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 3 Consultant Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official MPMMCC website. The last date to submit the application form is 05-07-2026. In this article, you'll find the Consultant recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and application form.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years for Consultant 'D', Max 45 years for Consultant 'E'
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 40 years | Maximum Age: 45 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radiodiagnosis) or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission.
qualification.details: Qualification: M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radiodiagnosis) or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission. Experience: Not required | Qualification: M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radio-diagnosis) or equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by National Medical Commission Experience: 03 years' post M.D./D.N.B. experience in the field.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Online Interview (for outstation candidates)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MPMMCC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MPMMCC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: MPMMCC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MPMMCC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MPMMCC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the MPMMCC Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MPMMCC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MPMMCC Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send your resume for the online interview for MPMMCC Consultant posts is 05 July 2026. Candidates opting for the walk-in interview should attend on 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in MPMMCC Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for Consultant posts at Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malaviya Cancer Centre. These include positions for Consultant 'D' and Consultant 'E' in Radiodiagnosis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for MPMMCC Consultant posts?
faq.answer: For Consultant 'D' (Radiodiagnosis), the maximum age limit is 40 years. For Consultant 'E' (Radiodiagnosis), the maximum age limit is 45 years as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for MPMMCC Consultant jobs?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.D. / D.N.B. (Radiology / Radiodiagnosis) or an equivalent postgraduate degree recognized by the National Medical Commission. Consultant 'E' also requires 3 years of post-MD/DNB experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Consultant posts at MPMMCC?
faq.answer: The salary for Consultant 'D' (Radiodiagnosis) is Rs. 1,28,000/- per month, and for Consultant 'E' (Radiodiagnosis), it is Rs. 1,40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MPMMCC Consultant Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview for local candidates. Outstation candidates have the option to attend an Online Interview after sending their resume and documents by the specified deadline.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the MPMMCC Consultant vacancies?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online by sending their resume and supporting documents in a single PDF file to the email address mentioned in the official notification by 05 July 2026. Alternatively, they can attend the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for MPMMCC Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Based on the provided information, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for the MPMMCC Consultant Recruitment 2026. Candidates should verify this in the detailed PDF.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the Walk-in Interview for MPMMCC Consultant posts be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Mahamana Pandit Madan Mohan Malaviya Cancer Centre (MPMMCC) in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh. Candidates are advised to check the exact venue in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the MPMMCC Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates attending the walk-in interview must carry their bio-data, recent passport size photograph, PAN card, Aadhar card, original educational and experience certificates, and one set of self-attested copies of all documents.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for MPMMCC Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send your resume for the online interview for MPMMCC Consultant posts is 05 July 2026. Candidates opting for the walk-in interview should attend on 07 July 2026.
